title: Rabbit's Reimagined Vanilla+
description: An enhanced version of survival designed to brighten up monotonous and lacking gameplay while staying true to the base game.
body:
A **reimagined**, and heavily curated modpack for vanilla+ survival. Including optimization mods for nearly outstanding **performance**, along with mods that enhance the **terrain generation, mobs, armour, and gameplay.** Intended to be inbetween the intensity of "client sided mods only" and entirely game altering, so there is a realistic **balance** that upholds the **vanilla-esque feel.**

**Gameplay (Most Important):**
- Bartering Station
- Ht's Treechop
- Panda's Falling Trees
- Disenchanting Table
- Another Furniture
- Gravestones
- Sophisticated Backpacks (Fabric Port) + Trinkets
- Easy Anvils
- Waystones
- Farmer's Delight Refabricated
- NutritionZ
- Advanced Netherite
- Guarding
- Fishing Frontier
- Carry On
- Early Stage
- Better Tridents

**Performance:**
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- More Culling
- Krypton
- Entity Culling
- Ferrite Core
- Fast Ip Ping
- Packet Fixer
- No Chat Reports
- Lithium
- Iris Shaders

**Terrain / World:**
- Tectonic
- Real Time of Day (Time Sync-up)
- Stellarity (End Revamp)
- Chunky (For Pre-gening)

**Structures:**
- Yung's Better: Jungle Temples, Ocean Monuments, Nether Fortresses
- Katter's Structures
- Nice Villages Remastered
- Phillips Ruins
- Hopo Better Mineshafts

**Ambience:**
- Cave Dust
- Lamb Dynamic Lights
- Danger Close
- Faster Spawners
- Variable Spawner Hardness
- 3D Skin Layers
- Cat Jam
- Bushier Flowers
- Torch Hit
- Enhanced Visuals
- Eating Animation
- You Died
- Enhanced Attack Indicator
- Cool Rain
- Dark Paintings
- Too Many Paintings
- Realistic Fire Spread
- Talk Bubbles
- Soul Fire'd
- Immersive Thunder
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Nether Portal Spread
- Fancy Healthbar
- Legendary Tooltips

**QOL (Quality Of Life):**
- Enchantment Descriptions
- Death Counter
- Herds Panic
- Auto Sprint Fix
- Boat Item View
- Model Gap Fix
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Centered Crosshair
- Equipment Compare
- JEI (Just Enough Items)
- Chat Heads
- Health Indicator
- Passable Foliage
- Fire Arrows Ignite

**Mobs:**
- Horse Buff
- Kaffee's Dual Ride
- Upgraded Mobs
- Cave Spider Spawn
- Nyf's Spiders
